description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a circular patch of grass with paved walkways leading to the main entrance. The front facade features a wide, covered porch supported by columns, and large floor-to-ceiling windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with smaller, symmetrically placed windows and minimal decorative elements. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored horizontal siding, giving the building a clean and contemporary appearance. The roof is flat and slightly overhangs the walls, providing shade and a streamlined silhouette. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, wide front porch, and large windows, clad in light horizontal siding. The design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on open, airy spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing a simple facade with two windows and horizontal siding, minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide covered porch, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and main entrance walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view with a small covered patio area, a back door, and a mix of window sizes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two symmetrically placed windows and a small set of steps leading to a secondary entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and smaller side and rear windows
